references.title: PERKC: Personalized kNN With CPT for Course Recommendations in Higher Education

extracted.Initialization Method: Learners are represented by the Quuestionnaire and Academic History.
extracted.Preprocessing Details: Learners are represented as personality (from questionnaire) and profile (from the remaning data). Both attributes are normalized and fed into a kNN algorithm (after normalization). Distance uses Hamming (sequences) and Cosine similarity (personality).
extracted.Comments:
Authors look to do some form of Collaborative Filtering to compute similarity between users (without the need for rating). 

The goal is to perform sequence prediction rather than perform Sequential Pattern Mining.
extracted.Limitations:
- Small set of students in test

- Only Accuracy is used to evaluate the results.

- Learners are required to answer the questionnaire to be initialized.

annotations.text: Students often select e-learning options to gain extra credits and and enhance their skills. The authors propose a personalizer recommender system that use Compact Prediction Tree to recommend courses for students to take. Algorithm is tested against other baseline approaches and is shown to outperform the alternatives.
